name: 11q13_4_DHCR7_NADSYN1_SD
description: 11q13.4 segmental duplication interval flanking DHCR7 (7-dehydrocholesterol reductase) and NADSYN1. Short SDs of 5-15 kb mediate small recurrent CNVs and host the Smith-Lemli-Opitz-syndrome causal gene.

architecture.internal_structure: Short SDs of 5-15 kb at 90-94% identity; processed-pseudogene-derived DHCR7 paralog fragments scattered.
